title: galium affrenum
intro: Galium affrenum, also known as Galium aparine's relative, is a type of flowering plant in the bedstraw family (Rubiaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and skin problems, due to its health benefits such as soothing and calming effects on the body. Galium affrenum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal preparations like salves and creams for topical application.
